description: Summer Undergraduate Research Fellowship (SURF) at Cornell's Software Engineering Lab, contributing to large-scale computer vision and runtime-verification research.
highlights: Conducted empirical research on inline test co-evolution across 30+ open-source Java projects, published results in a peer-reviewed venue
Contributed to large-scale video understanding as part of the Ego4D initiative — the world's largest egocentric video dataset (Meta AI)
Developed computer vision algorithms for autonomous-systems research under supervision of Cornell CS faculty
